title: senna fruticosa
intro: Senna fruticosa, also known as the Alexandrian senna, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region and the Middle East, belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effects, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna fruticosa include treating constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues. Senna fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or dried leaves for consumption, with caution advised due to its potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
